resources.string: The app helps you restock products in the supermarket.
- view items that need to be refilled
The app helps you keep track of everything.
Important: Always wear the wrist strap while working with the device so it does not fall.
Scan the code on the left side of the shelf or ...
Please select or scan a shelf first
Delete all open items for this shelf?
Warning: According to the app, only %d products are in storage.
There is no photo of this product yet.
You can open the camera now or go back with the X.
Are there more products on the shelf?
I could not find the products.
Scan article to check it off
All crossed-out products on this page will now be deleted for good.
%1$d articles in the database, %2$d with EAN
Do you really want to delete all marked articles? This cannot be undone.
Shows which products were changed and when
There are no changed stock levels yet.
Product was searched in storage but not found.
On this screen, scan only shelf or zone barcodes (shelf: / zone:)
%d shelf/shelves with missing required fields - import disabled
%d zone(s) with missing required fields - import disabled
Import successful. %d articles skipped (shelf/article not available).
Delete zones & shelves that are not included
These settings may only be changed by administrators. Do you want to continue?
If you cannot find the products, leave the marking as it is.
The next employee will take care of it.
Here you will find help for this page. We will add more detailed help text later. Always pay attention to the heading and the large main button on the current page.
You understood how the help works. On the next pages you can always press the question mark if you need help.
I will explain how the app works.
If you have a question, you can press the help button with the question mark.
At the moment you can use the app for the following tasks:
2. Show the number of available products
3. Remember the number of missing products
4. Find the correct zone in the storage room
5. Remove the found product from the search list

What can the app do?

At the moment you can use the app for the following tasks:

Scan products with the barcode.

Show the number of available products in the supermarket and in storage.

If products are missing, mark them.

The app then helps you find these products in storage.

This is the short introduction to the app.

The most important areas

- Scan products
- Mark articles
- Fetch items from storage

How to work with the app

1. Choose a task.
2. Always follow the screen step by step.
3. Use the help button with the question mark if you need help.

How scanning works

Press the button with your index finger.

The scanner produces a red light with a red dot. The red dot should point at the barcode.

IMAGE:Code_an_Seite_scannen_2.jpg

Important while scanning

Light from above can interfere. Hold your hand over the code to cast a shadow.

If the code is not recognized

If the code is not recognized, you can also scan the barcode on the product.

IMAGE:Strichcode_am_Produkt_scannen.jpg

Already marked products

If you already see products on this page, you or the previous worker have already marked articles. You do not need to mark them again. To delete markings, simply swipe left.

Shelf sections in the supermarket

Here in the supermarket, the shelves are divided into small sections so you can orient yourself more easily. This helps you find products faster.

IMAGE:Bezeichnung_der_Regale.jpg

The sections are called A1, A2 or A3, for example. These labels are abbreviations used to mark the individual shelf sections. They are also shown on the posted plan.

How you work here

You go through the individual shelf sections one by one. When you have checked a shelf section, mark it on your paper list with a pen. Write down the date and make a check mark. That shows that the shelf has been checked.

Small number at the top right

If you see a small number at the top right of a shelf on the screen, articles have already been marked there. Most likely someone before you did not find these products in the storage room.

If you have time, you can try to find these items too. Or you can ask an employee to help you.

Important before scanning

So the scanner knows which shelf you are standing in front of, first scan the barcode that you find on the left side of the price strip on the shelf.

IMAGE:Code_an_Seite_scannen_2.jpg

How scanning works

Press the button with your index finger.

The scanner produces a red light with a red dot. The red dot should point at the barcode.

IMAGE:roter_Punkt.jpg

Mark article

You selected a product with the scanner. Here you can see the total quantity in the supermarket and in storage. Compare how many products are on the shelf and how many you want to fetch from storage.

IMAGE:Anzahl_der_Produkte_speichern.jpg

So that you can search for the items in storage later, save them here.

IMAGE:Artikel_vormerken.jpg

How to report a discrepancy

1. Check the product name, EAN and shelf.
2. Compare the scanned stock level with the actual stock.
3. Enter the current stock level below.

Important

- Only the lower field is for entering data.
- Use "Done" to finish the entry.
- Use "Save" to record the report.

Afterwards

- The app remembers when the stock level was changed.

How does the storage room work?

There is less space in the storage room than on the sales floor.

That is why individual shelves in the storage room are grouped into zones. These zones are called Z1, Z2 or Z3, for example.

The zones are marked with colors in the storage room so you can find them easily. The colors match the colors in your overview. Z-1 Breakfast, for example, is orange.

IMAGE:Zonen_im_Lager.jpg

In this zone you will find several shelves grouped together. Somewhere there you will also find the product that you want to fetch.

What is shown here?

On this screen you see the products that you want to fetch from storage. The yellow number at the top right tells you how many products must be searched in each zone.

If you press a zone, the individual products are shown.

How to proceed

1. Choose an article from the list.
2. Tap the entry for the detailed view.
3. There you check the photo, shelf and quantity.

Delete marked products

On this screen you can delete marked products. The products will still be shown as deleted. You can also undo the deletion.

Here you check a single article.

Compare

- the photo
- the product name
- the shelf
- the quantity

Did you find the product?

Very good. Take a rolling cart and place the products on it.

IMAGE:Produkte_auf_den-Rollwagen.jpg

Here you create or edit a shelf.

How to proceed

1. Assign a short shelf ID, for example A1 or C2.
2. Write a clear description.
3. Choose the matching storage zone.
4. Save the change below.

Important

- The shelf ID should be unique.

Here you create or edit a storage zone.

How to proceed

1. Assign a clear zone ID, for example Z1.
2. Write a short description.
3. Choose a suitable color.
4. Save the zone below.

Important

- The color helps with quick orientation later.

This page is for technical settings.

Here you can

- change API credentials
- import or export data
- manage storage zones
- manage shelves

Important

- Change these values only if you know exactly what you are doing.
- Incorrect entries can disrupt the app.

Here you can find the general settings.

Here you can

- change the app language
- generate test data
- reset all markings

Important

- For shelves, storage zones, import and export, continue to the technical configuration.
